title: dicrastylis globiflora
intro: Dicrastylis globiflora, a flowering plant native to Australia, belongs to the family Lamiaceae and is commonly known as the white or purple-flowering Dicrastylis. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Dicrastylis globiflora include its ability to soothe and calm the respiratory system, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Dicrastylis globiflora can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures for topical and internal use.
